programme.desc: The kids go to space and join Celery in a race between them, Uncle Zucchini, and Auntie Eggplant and Zerk.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Elmo the Engineer
programme.desc: Elmo and his dad become engineers and design a 'toy putter awayer' to help Elmo put away his toys.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Lost Voice/ Doll Hospital
programme.desc: Pinkalicious and Jasmine play doctor and find themselves taking care of all the dolls in Pinkville.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Tudor Week
programme.desc: Follow the five remaining bakers as they attempt to re-create dishes fit for the Tudors. The signature is a savoury stuffed pie, the technical is an unusual Tudor biscuit that has the bakers tied up in knots, and the showstopper is a marzipan spectacle.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Grantchester

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Beecham House

programme.title: Lucy Worsley's Royal Myths & Secrets: Queen Anne, the Mother of Great Britain

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: What's at the Center of the Earth? Troglobites!/ Minerals!
programme.desc: The Pteranodon Family meets creatures without eyes called 'troglobites' in an underground cave.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Nick's Cricket/ Go With the Flow
programme.desc: The Cat teaches the kids what to consider when making a shelter for a living creature, and about how water always seeks the lowest level.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Post-Mortem Blues
programme.desc: In the moments after William Lewis' death, Sergeant Benson is rescued by the SVU squad, but her torment continues. The Internal Affairs investigation of her actions is deemed inconclusive, and with no evidence to corroborate her story, she risks arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Thought Criminal
programme.desc: Under the guidance of Lieutenant Murphy, Sergeant Benson and the SVU take an active approach to catching sex offenders. They target Simon Wilkes, a well-regarded photographer with a secret life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spring Awakening

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Glasgowman's Wrath

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chicago Crossover
programme.desc: Voight, Lindsay and Halstead track a child-pornography victim to his last-know whereabouts in New York City, where Benson and the SVU squad get a new lead. Lindsay discovers someone from her past is involved and hopes to find the ringleader.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pattern Seventeen
programme.desc: When a series of young, petite, girls are all assaulted in the early morning hours, Rollins matches the pattern to several rape cases she worked in Atlanta.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forgiving Rollins

programme.title: Dirty John: The Betty Broderick Story: The Twelfth of Never
programme.desc: Betty faces Dan in divorce court and is crushingly defeated, sending her past a point of no return.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: A Story of More Woe
programme.desc: Benson tries to help two teenaged sisters after their father is killed. Rollins goes into labor.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assumptions
programme.desc: The SVU searches for two suspects spotted fleeing the scene after a Muslim woman is assaulted inside a synagogue. Meanwhile, Benson is dismayed to find Rob Miller is out on bail.

programme.title: Dirty John: The Betty Broderick Story: The Twelfth of Never
programme.desc: Betty faces Dan in divorce court and is crushingly defeated, sending her past a point of no return.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Life Is Fluid

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's European Booking
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking but he can't afford to take Lucy with him.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Passports
programme.desc: Lucy and Fred try to find people who can prove they were born.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Rose inherits her late uncle's estate, provided she takes care of his prized pig 'Baby.'

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Cat Cora prepares burgers and actress Courtney Hope talks about 'The Bold and the Beautiful.' Plus, 'Scoot Over and Make Some Room' author, Heather Avis stops by.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: Movie: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: A woman decides to move home after years of organizing fashion shows. Her mover decides to show her how beautiful her new home is, leading to an unexpected romance for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip in 'Not Without My Anus'
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: Britney's New Look
programme.desc: When the boys help Britney Spears get to the North Pole, they discover the shocking secret behind her popularity.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: Going Native
programme.desc: Butters is going on a journey to follow in his Hawaiian ancestors' path.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Oh, the Guilt
programme.desc: Derek learns more about Mark and Addison's relationship while Bailey treats a mother battling breast cancer. The interns spend their time defending a resident's competence as Meredith and Addison examine a couple in a rather awkward position.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let the Angels Commit
programme.desc: Much to the envy of her fellow doctors, Cristina scrubs in on the rare 'humpty dumpty' procedure before Alex questions his future medical specialty. Derek gets a surprise while George and Addison work with a pregnant woman with an unusual dilemma.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Where the Boys Are
programme.desc: While Addison and Callie team up to work on a patient, the boys of Seattle Grace go on a camping trip together. A suspicious Bailey confronts Cristina while Meredith assists Sloan with a procedure unlike any she has ever experienced at the hospital.

programme.title: Movie: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: A couple sets out to make life difficult for each other after a wild time in Vegas.

programme.title: Movie: Killers

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Harvey-Woodruff Family
programme.desc: The Military Makeover construction team is in full swing.

programme.title: The Closer: Living Proof
programme.desc: A long-brewing feud leads to a stabbing on Christmas Eve and the accidental death of a patriarch in a case that threatens to derail everyone's holiday plans. Brenda is especially put out since her parents are in town with a special announcement.

programme.title: The Closer: Living Proof
programme.desc: A blood feud within a refugee family from Kosovo results in another victim, forcing Brenda and her team, along with Captain Raydor, to continue their investigation on Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Closer: An Ugly Game
programme.desc: The routine arrest of a crack addict exposes a questionable rehab facility and leads Brenda and her squad on a race to find a missing young woman. The case leads Fritz to reveal to Brenda some ugly truths about her past.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Collins/ Matlock
programme.desc: A mom from a baseball-fanatic family trades lives with a punk rock hairdresser mom.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Yonts/ Jan-Turan
programme.desc: A pageant-obsessed mother swaps families with a mother who shuns makeup.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Downs/ Bailey
programme.desc: A career-obsessed workaholic mom trades places with a child-obsessed protective mom.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Nazario/ Lassell
programme.desc: A fun-loving Manhattan mother trades places with an authoritative, prudish mother.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: A small-town electrician sits on Texas death row for the murder of a 19-year-old college student, but forensic science could exonerate him.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mississippi Mother
programme.desc: Sabrina Butler, a 17-year old woman, arrives at a Mississippi hospital with her baby dead on arrival. Nurses and doctors suspect foul play, and Sabrina cannot give straight answers about what happened to her baby.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time and Nick gets sent 20 feet off the deck despite is lack of heights. Meanwhile, Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks down Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: All on the Line: Cinderella Tuna
programme.desc: A perfect storm hits Gloucester, pitting man versus nature as Captains Johnny Johnson Jr. and Danny Jr. hunt for a final score. With time running out, Danny Jr. lands a jumbo tuna that may save his family's season.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Face the Fire
programme.desc: The Raneys charge into the fury of homesteads threatened by fire, including a failing Idaho farm in desperate need of a firebreak and a California homestead in serious danger of raging wildfires.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: All on the Line: Cinderella Tuna
programme.desc: A perfect storm hits Gloucester, pitting man versus nature as Captains Johnny Johnson Jr. and Danny Jr. hunt for a final score. With time running out, Danny Jr. lands a jumbo tuna that may save his family's season.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Face the Fire
programme.desc: The Raneys charge into the fury of homesteads threatened by fire, including a failing Idaho farm in desperate need of a firebreak and a California homestead in serious danger of raging wildfires.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Rebellion
programme.desc: It's moonshine season in Appalachia. Josh has hit the ground running but working solo can lead to catastrophic results. And former outlaw Tim Smith is training his son JT to help run his legal outfit.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Patti and David scramble to locate a clean water source for their operation. Mark Rogers ventures into unfamiliar territory to secure new buyers. Mark and Digger use an old moonshiner's trick to spook intruders from their still site.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Big Decisions in the Big Country
programme.desc: It's Adam's birthday and the family is celebrating with a weekend trip at a Dude Ranch. The Busbys must make a difficult decision about the girls' schooling.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: My Busby Valentine
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, Adam is torn over how to make his little girls feel special during the holiday. Danielle throws the family a surprise they will never forget, and the Busby's learn about fire safety with an unexpected twist.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Snow-cation
programme.desc: It's a trip of firsts for the Quints as the family heads to Wyoming for a ski trip. As the Busbys prepare for Hazel's eye appointment, they fear the worst. Also, with a global crisis looming, Adam and Danielle wonder what waits for them at home.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Coronavirus Changes Everything
programme.desc: As the threat of coronavirus rises, the Busbys must deal with homeschooling their six daughters and juggling birthday plans amidst the crisis. Hazel's appointment is coming up, but the Busbys aren't sure if it will happen and what the outcome will be.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Happy Face Killer: Keith Hunter Jesperson
programme.desc: Melissa Moore, daughter of Keith Hunter Jesperson, infamously known as the 'Happy Face Killer,' tells her story as the daughter of a serial killer. She shares what it was like growing up with a father who, she later learned, was committing murders.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Killer Clown: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Karen Kuzma, sister of John Wayne Gacy, comes out of the shadows to reveal intimate details of one of the world's most notorious serial killers. Joined by her daughter, Karen returns to her childhood home in Chicago to disclose formative events.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Phoenix Serial Shooter: Dale Hausner
programme.desc: Randy Hausner, brother of serial shooter Dale Hausner, shares the inside story of a man who terrorized the city of Phoenix in a year and a half-long killing spree. He reveals his brother's never before seen journal disclosing his development.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: DC Sniper: John Allen Muhammad
programme.desc: Mildred Muhammad, ex-wife of infamous 'DC Sniper' John Allen Muhammad, reveals how the man she loves disintegrated into a monster who threatens to kill her, including an interview from prison with Melissa Moore, Muhammad's teenage accomplice.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: In an exclusive interview, Drew Peterson's eldest son shares for the first time his memories of being raised by the man who he once admired above all others, his father.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Spokane Serial Killer: Robert Lee Yates
programme.desc: Amber and Michelle Yates, daughter of serial killer Richard Yates, speak about their father. They reveal new details and provide home videos of a strict father who disciplined his children by day, and hunted innocent women at night.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: The Night Stalker: Richard Ramirez
programme.desc: In one year, Richard Ramirez killed 13 people. In this episode, his ex sister-in-law and niece come to terms with the evil that existed in their family and meet Bill Cairns, who survived one of Richard's attacks, but has never fully recovered.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Classified Ad Rapist: Bobby Joe Long
programme.desc: Cindy Brown reveals how her childhood sweetheart and husband, Bobby Joe Long, evolves into a fiend who rapes more than 50 women, ultimately killing ten. Their son Chris, talks on camera for the first time, revealing his struggle as a killer's child.

programme.title: The First 48: Taken
programme.desc: When a young man and his pregnant fiancée are executed after a failed ransom attempt, Atlanta Homicide will stop at nothing to identify the elusive suspect.

programme.title: The First 48: Birthday Girl
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a 14-year-old girl is killed at her birthday party when gunmen open fire on a crowd. With multiple shooters to track down, the homicide team races against the clock to identify which people at the party were the killers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Below the Belt
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put their sword wielding skills to the test while teaching fencing, and one joker is especially 'en garde' when he faces an Olympian. Plus, the guys trim away their dignity while posing as fabulous hairstylists at a salon.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q host a team building seminar that's definitely not safe for work, and then channel their inner Picassos by posing as caricature artists on the boardwalk.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elevating the Game
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hop behind the register at a burger joint and then head to a department store where they have only themselves to blame. And tonight's big loser gets into a rigged elevator only to find his own worst nightmare.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: That Ain't Right
programme.desc: Mary hosts a benefit event in Pittsfield in hopes of helping save the Community Theatre, expand her product reach and pitch the idea of a comedy tour.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Tirdy Works: That Ain't Right
programme.desc: Mary hosts a benefit event in Pittsfield in hopes of helping save the Community Theatre, expand her product reach and pitch the idea of a comedy tour.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: Emma Willmann coaches Mary on her comedy routine ahead of the big show. Dale confides a secret to Mary, and asks for a chance to perform at the show.

programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed
programme.desc: Savannah returns home for Jackson's third birthday, she brings her a new puppy. This infuriates Todd. Chase attempts to bond with his dad, purely for his own financial gain.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase
programme.desc: When Chase scores an internship at a local television station, he is forced to deal with some difficult talent, Todd Chrisley. And, looking for a new hobby, Faye and Julie learn Italian.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye
programme.desc: Todd discovers that Faye has injured her foot on yet another gambling adventure and insists she recover at his house. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie push a reluctant Grayson to take up a hobby.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On
programme.desc: In an effort to cheer up Grayson, Savannah organizes a farewell weekend for Grayson and friends. Meanwhile, Chase teams up with BFF Parker for an unexpected get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: As the Chrisley's settle into their new Nashville home, Todd begins to encroach upon Savannah's independence. Meanwhile, Grayson takes up wrestling and challenges Chase to a match.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator
programme.desc: The family prepares for the Grand Opening of their newly purchased juice bar, but Chase can't take the job seriously. Back at the house, Faye tries to collect on a bet she made with Grayson.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase in Charge
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head to LA for Julie's liposuction procedure, leaving Chase in charge. But when Chase abuses his newfound authority, Todd must return home early to put a stop to Chase's antics.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Todd takes the juice bar employees on a teambuilding excursion, Savannah and Chase get into a disagreement. And when Faye has a health scare, the Chrisley's are forced to come together.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Goat Farm Yourself
programme.desc: Todd sends Chase and Savannah to a goat farm to learn the value of hard work. But things go array when the siblings let their petty bickering get in the way.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Goes Country
programme.desc: While Todd works on a special song for Julie's birthday, he tricks her into planning her own surprise party. But when Julie threatens to cancel Todd's is forced to ask Savannah for help.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hawaii Love You So
programme.desc: Against Julie's wishes, Todd brings the family on their 20th anniversary trip to Hawaii. When Savannah and Lindsie are charged with watching Nanny Faye, they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Don't Kale Yourself
programme.desc: Lindsie challenges Todd and Julie to change their unhealthy habits. When Chase gets his wisdom teeth removed, Todd takes advantage of his altered state of mind.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Trouble and a Chest Bubble

programme.title: Botched By Nature: The Chronicles of Hernia

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Collapsed In and Busted Out
programme.desc: Doctors Dubrow and Nassif head to Arizona to help a woman whose nose collapsed into her own face. In NYC, they meet a college student with an extremely oversized breast, and later ride through Central Park checking up on the HBIC, Tiffany Pollard.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Crooked and Cracked
programme.desc: Paul and Terry take their surgical expertise to patients who have been botched by nature.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: This Little Piggy Went to Surgery
programme.desc: The doctors travel to Texas to meet a female war veteran that was struck by lightning leaving her breasts and body disfigured. Then, they head to South Carolina to consult with a woman who has a misplaced toe on each foot.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Boobs and Tubes
programme.desc: The doctors set out for Vegas to meet a young mother born with Pectus excavatum, and whose underlying breast issues are getting harder to deal with. In Chicago, they consult with a woman born pre-maturely with nasal complications as an adult.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Lip Service
programme.desc: The doctors visit a young mother in Detroit suffering from Tubular Breast Deformation. Later, they consult with a woman in Atlanta whose tumor has left overgrown tissue in her mouth. Before leaving the ATL, they visit past patient Dwight Eubanks.

programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom. She starts off with savory Green Pancakes for lunch, and then she's in dinner mode with a hearty Funeral Hotdish and a crunchy Romaine Salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Falafel Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a Middle Eastern feast for her college friends visiting the farm, and the food is as colorful as the company! Molly starts with her crispy falafel and a creamy homemade labneh.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Suppers
programme.desc: Molly is cooking up her most delicious and memorable suppers from her early days on the farm. She makes two upper-Midwest classics for a weeknight dinner with her husband Nick and his parents including chicken pot hot dish and a sweet cookie 'salad.'

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: One Thing Leads to Another
programme.desc: Black beans are the focus of Ree's menu today. She makes a mango guacamole and a delicious taco pizza. Then, she makes grilled veggie burritos and a quick black bean burger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Scrumptious 16-Minute Meals
programme.desc: No time is no trouble as Ree whips up three super fast 16-minute meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alone Again
programme.desc: Ree's got the house to herself and is whipping up her favorite eats.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fence Work
programme.desc: Ree prepares a beef taco bar for the gang fixing the fence, with green chile queso, chipotle salsa and chili beans. Plus, angel sugar cookies and chilled homemade blueberry lemonade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 6
programme.desc: It's all about summer cooking and ideas for easy entertaining as Ree Drummond cooks up delicious recipes with her kid crew. For casual dinners, Ree makes amazing Rigatoni with Creamy Corn and great Greek-Style Turkey Burgers stuffed into pitas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a cocktail bash for the crew helping to open her store in town. There's a delicious line up of make-ahead portable canapes on the menu.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All ABC Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's ABC games aren't as easy as 1, 2, 3! The chefs must prove their skills in three rounds as they make comfort classics and dinners with seafood and fried ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Asian Food Showdown
programme.desc: Asian cuisine takes over Flavortown as four chefs face Guy Fieri's challenges. He gives them a list of ingredients for their noodle dishes and makes them use tiny shopping carts to shop for their rice dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Scratch Chef Showdown
programme.desc: In a world of convenience food, four scratch chefs show Guy Fieri what happens when convenience goes out the window. They have to make each component in their dishes entirely from scratch, like bread for their soup-and-sandwich combo.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Serving Up Summer!
programme.desc: Four chefs celebrate summer with a barbecue block party where a roll of the dice picks the crazy items in their dish. Then the chefs have to improvise when their seafood spectacular comes with a weight restriction.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: A Few Good Squatchers
programme.desc: The team is in Georgia investigating sightings in and around the Ft. Stewart Army base. After meeting with a witness who saw a Bigfoot through a thermal imager the team looks for the best place to hold their final night investigation.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: The Best Little Bigfoot in Texas
programme.desc: The team returns to the Lone Star State to investigate new evidence of a Bigfoot trackway. Confident a juvenile Bigfoot made the tracks, they serve up a true Texas BBQ, fixin' to prove juvenile sasquatches are messing with Texas.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Grand Bigfoot Hotel
programme.desc: The team reports to the Mount Washington resort in New Hampshire where Bigfoot sightings have been unnerving hotel guests. Mounting evidence points to Franconia Notch, where the team blasts calls from an alpine horn, hoping to herd in a Bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatching in the Midnight Sun
programme.desc: New evidence brings the team back to Alaska, where they decide to divide and conquer. While Matt and Bobo are down in the small village of Bethel, Ranae and Cliff are investigating near Fairbanks.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Dronie Loves Squatchie
programme.desc: Cliff has brought the team back to his home state of Oregon for the fourth time in search of Bigfoots. With a bounty of Bigfoot habitat, Cliff enlists professional drone pilots, who may provide the aerial support they need to get a beaver state Sasquatch.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatching on Sacred Ground
programme.desc: The team receives a special invitation to investigate the Klamath reservation in Southern Oregon, where Bigfoot sightings are a regular occurrence. The team investigates a canyon so squatchy, the tribe themselves don't dare to venture in after dark.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: 1, 2, 3, 4, I Declare a Squatch War
programme.desc: In this special episode, find out what the team thinks as they head to Washington and Oregon and try to determine which is the squatchier state.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: Search for the Yeti
programme.desc: The team from Finding Bigfoot travel around the world to Nepal in search of the infamous Yeti. They visit monasteries with Yeti relics, talk to firsthand witnesses and travel into the dense forests of the Himalayas. Will they succeed in finding evidence?

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Surf's Up, Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to Santa Cruz to visit the Bigfoot Discovery Museum. The museum's owner directs them to recent eyewitnesses and secret hotspots. Bobo hopes the smells from an authentic Hawaiian luau will be too much for nearby Bigfoots to resist.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Disco Bigfoot
programme.desc: Compelling evidence brings the team back to the most surprisingly squatchy state, New Jersey. After a night investigation and town hall meeting, Cliff breaks from the team to squatch with his friend, comedian Bobcat Goldthwait.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: A Few Good Squatchers
programme.desc: The team is in Georgia investigating sightings in and around the Ft. Stewart Army base. After meeting with a witness who saw a Bigfoot through a thermal imager the team looks for the best place to hold their final night investigation.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Rhino Due Date
programme.desc: Eastern black rhino Kitani is due to give birth, and help swell the ranks of this endangered species. However, with Kitani having lost three previous calves, it's a worrying time. Keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tiger Mother-daughter Drama
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger, Kirana, and her daughter Kasarna, have started to clash at mealtimes. The keepers must come up with a plan to sort out the tensions between mother and child.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventurous Bear Cub
programme.desc: Andean bear Lima has a three-month-old cub, but keepers are concerned that her overprotective behaviour may curb its development. Later, when Lima's back is turned, cub Madidi embarks on an adventure into the paddock next door.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Happy Couple of Camels

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Runaway Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a skittish Savannah cat with an unusual condition. Dr. Amy helps a beloved dog who was injured chasing a coyote. And, the team tries to find the owners of a dog rescued on the highway.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Lucky Break
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a dog with a serious illness. Mel and her daughter rescue a baby squirrel, while Dr. Jeff and Dr. Petra team up to save a beloved cat hit by a car. Dr. Baier gives a rabbit owner a surprise and a tiny dog with a big spirit needs a home.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jess' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic. A neglected turtle needs a new home, and the team falls in love with a litter of stray kittens.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Blown Away
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team help a dog lost during a windstorm. Dr. Baier treats a small bird with a big personality. When a paralyzed dog is abandoned, Susan comes to the rescue. And the team head out to help an alligator injured in a fight.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Tiger's Tale
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff gives hope to a concerned owner when their dog is diagnosed with cancer. The team cares for a litter of abandoned kittens. Dr. Amy solves the mystery of a beloved cat's painful injury. And Dr. Jeff and Hector help a rescued tiger find love.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Tiny Soul Mate
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and Hector help 40 miniature Australian shepherds rescued from a puppy mill. Vet tech Christine turns to Dr. Jeff when her elderly Chihuahua has trouble walking. And Dr. Jeff is called out to treat an alpaca with a serious infection.

programme.title: Eating History: Apocalypse Chow
programme.desc: Josh and Old Smokey attempt to bake a box of 40-year-old chocolate chip cookie mix. The duo then visits a bar for underground tasting and eats Cold War era survival food.

programme.title: Eating History: Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: Josh and Smokey try to champion the oldest cereal ever eaten. Then, they examine a Vietnam-era ration, but aren't sure the 40-year old meat inside can possibly be preserved. Later they try a 40-year-old hot sauce to find out if it gets hotter with age.

programme.title: Eating History: Expiration Unknown
programme.desc: Josh and Old Smokey travel to an abandoned mining town in search of forgotten food. Afterwards, they drink one of America's most infamous lost beers and taste a Viking elixir.

programme.title: Eating History: From a Galaxy Far, Far Away
programme.desc: Josh and Old Smokey put a classic Korean War era chocolate taffy legend to the test, and then try out a sizable portion of nose jelly. Plus, they open a classic cereal.

programme.title: Eating History: Brush With History
programme.desc: Josh and Old Smokey eat decades old corn chips and century-old Civil War hardtack, then 'freshen up' with 100-year-old tooth powder, all to determine whether these forgotten foods have survived the test of time.

programme.title: Eating History: Flavor Explosion
programme.desc: Old Smokey and Josh feast on the most notorious military rations ever made. Afterwards, they taste a powdered candy from the '70s and visit a beer club that has a brew that changes colors.

programme.title: Eating History: A Space Odyssey
programme.desc: Houston, we have a potato. Old Smokey and Josh travel to the final frontier for some spacey spuds. Then they cook up some revolutionary rice, and visit an estate sale to find forgotten goodies.

programme.title: Eating History: Once You Pop
programme.desc: The boys crack open a 40-year-old can of chips, and then travel to Michigan to meet a couple with a collection of brand memorabilia. They also drink a soda infamous for being a massive flop.

programme.title: Eating History: The Candy Man
programme.desc: Something's fishy when the guys administer the 'slap test' to emergency drinking water rations from 1953. Then, some classic Italian canned food from a legendary chef has a surprising shelf life.

programme.title: Eating History: Leave it to Beaver Tail
programme.desc: Josh and Smokey sample three generations of America's favourite sandwich cookies to see how they've changed over the years. Then, the boys open a box of over 30-year old bat cereal from the Dark Knight.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Van-Tastic
programme.desc: Danny is so proud of the van he restored for his bandmate John Zito that he decides to give his own classic van a make-over. Later, Danny and Kevin pull over an NBA star and Danny gets some ink of his own.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Burning Out
programme.desc: Danny has big retro plans for a 1972 Cutlass he hopes to flip, and is counting on his fab team to do her right. Roli seeks the help of the guys to learn to do a burn-out. Danny checks out a 1971 Torino whose owner can't seem to put a price on it.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Baggers Can't Be Choosers
programme.desc: A customer wants to trick out his 2004 Harley-Davidson Road Glide, but both Shannon and Ryan aren't sure they can do everything he wants. A fellow collector drops by dangling a rare 1970 Lincoln Mark III in front of Danny, who can't wait to take her out.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The King and the Count
programme.desc: Kevin and the team come together to make something special for Danny. Meanwhile Danny runs into an old pal and his 1959 Corvette gasser, but it's a ride once owned by the King himself that brings Danny to his knees.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Willys for Warriors
programme.desc: Danny checks out a collection that includes a 1933 Ford Roadster and a '53 Henry J. Meanwhile Kevin, Ryan and Mike make an unauthorised purchase and the pressure is on Ryan to show it's worthwhile.

programme.title: Counting Cars: True Fire Fiasco
programme.desc: A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer. Also, Danny stumbles upon a collection of seriously fast rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Superfine Econoline
programme.desc: Danny makes an old Ford Econoline look so cool that, in the end, two buyers get into a bidding war for it. Danny can score big, but only if he can let his baby go. Also, Mike and Roli find a BMW motorcycle with a lot of history.

programme.desc: As an artist, Daniel relies on inspiration, but he can't inspire his 2-year-old Pekingese, Pekaso (Picasso), to eat or drink.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Hairy Houdini
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mission: Control
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Down Under
programme.desc: Cesar meets a mail carrier-hating dog, an aggressive Shar-Pei and a barking dog.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Color Purr-Pol
programme.desc: When Charles hears of a new technological breakthrough, he decides it’s time to give his partially colorblind father the greatest gift of all: the gift of color.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Un-Bee-lievable
programme.desc: The tough Michigan winter has finally broken, and local animals are abuzz in the warmer weather.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Piggin' in the Rain
programme.desc: Gloomy weather doesn't stop Pol's crew from taking on a range of unique cases, including testy bulls, coughing pigs and wobbly reindeer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goodnight Mooooooon
programme.desc: From unplanned pregnancies and long labors to mystery symptoms and power outages, the vets at Pol Veterinary Services have their hands full!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mommy Reindeerest
programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Cities of the Bible
programme.desc: The latest discoveries at cutting-edge archaeological excavations shed new light on the lost cities of the Bible, and using hi-tech investigative methods, experts are rethinking everything they know about these ancient worlds.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Caligula's Forbidden Fleet
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates evidence of a lost fleet of ancient ships that once belonged to Rome's mad emperor, and using cutting-edge tech, he reveals these wrecks' link to one of the twentieth century's greatest villains.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Explorers uncover evidence that supports the legend of a lost civilization in the Amazon.

programme.title: Unearthed: Jericho's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries at the lost city of Jericho offer fresh evidence about the biblical battle that brought its impregnable walls down. Using the latest tech, experts might reveal if Joshua and the Israelites really conquered this ancient city and how.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Caligula's Forbidden Fleet
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates evidence of a lost fleet of ancient ships that once belonged to Rome's mad emperor, and using cutting-edge tech, he reveals these wrecks' link to one of the twentieth century's greatest villains.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Explorers uncover evidence that supports the legend of a lost civilization in the Amazon.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Empire of the Amazon
programme.desc: New evidence could lead to the discovery of an unknown ancient civilization in the Amazon rainforest. An island disappears, and investigators are mystified. An unidentified submarine is spotted in a North Korean shipyard.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Catfished
programme.desc: A 28-year-old is catfished by an online prankster. Incensed, he sets his target on the only person he can think of -- the girl in the pictures.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Honeytrap
programme.desc: An aspiring young boxer leaves in night to meet girl who added him on Facebook. The next day he if sound dead in his car and the murder reveals a dark family secret kept hidden for over 30 years.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Down the Hill
programme.desc: 13-year-old Abby Williams and 14-year-old Libby German go for a short walk on a popular hiking trail and then disappear. And then 13-year-old Dylan Redwine vanishes on Thanksgiving break, 2012, while visiting his dad in Vallecito, Colorado.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: TV Dreams Cut Short
programme.desc: Two young women who dream of big success as television anchors are just embarking on their careers when their plans come to a violent end. They are murdered in their own apartments and there are no signs of forced entry.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Stay With Us, Madison
programme.desc: Madison Wells, a sixteen-year-old student in New Jersey, is found murdered in her aunt's kitchen. When police look into her relationship with a twenty-year-old, they go down a rabbit hole that exposes an abusive relationship with a tragic end.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Down by Fire
programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: TV Dreams Cut Short
programme.desc: Two young women who dream of big success as television anchors are just embarking on their careers when their plans come to a violent end. They are murdered in their own apartments and there are no signs of forced entry.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Down by Fire
programme.desc: Ryne Zahner is an inspiration to his high school math students in Arizona. His friends see him as one of the nicest people they know. When a hooded murderer guns him down after a night of partying, the entire community struggles to grasp his murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Down the Hill
programme.desc: 13-year-old Abby Williams and 14-year-old Libby German go for a short walk on a popular hiking trail and then disappear. And then 13-year-old Dylan Redwine vanishes on Thanksgiving break, 2012, while visiting his dad in Vallecito, Colorado.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Her husband is devastated and detectives have few clues to work with... until chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Salvador Vaca Garcia tearfully appears on local news when his girlfriend disappears. John Walsh scrutinizes Vaca Garcia's story. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Brian Keith Freeman who allegedly slits his fiancé's throat when their engagement falls apart.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: John Walsh looks at whether Alicia Osibin may be responsible for her own mother's murder; Callahan speaks with Andrea, alleged victim of Frederick McLean's abuse, who is desperate for McLean's capture.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When an unthinkably violent criminal flees before his trial, John Walsh joins local authorities on the chase for Michael Waguespack. Cal uncovers hidden and painful truths in a Christmas Eve tragedy that sent police hunting for Miguel Angel Martinez.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: John works with investigators to bring Frank Contreras into custody after he commits a terrible crime witnessed by a child; Cal takes on a heartbreaking case where authorities desperately need the public's help to identify a vicious criminal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: All-American Murder
programme.desc: Best-selling author James Patterson investigates the life and death of convicted murderer and former New England Patriot's player Aaron Hernandez. In April, 2017, Aaron committed suicide in a Massachusetts prison where he was serving a life sentence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: University of Virginia student Hannah Graham went missing in Charlottesville, Virginia and was ultimately found murdered. Hannah went missing after a night out with friends. This case lead police to other cases of unsolved attacks spanning a decade.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: University of Virginia student Hannah Graham went missing in Charlottesville, Virginia and was ultimately found murdered. Hannah went missing after a night out with friends. This case lead police to other cases of unsolved attacks spanning a decade.

programme.title: See No Evil: Mr. Reed Will See You
programme.desc: Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. What seems like a possible crime of passion is turned on its head after a surprise discovery. Surveillance footage helps police unravel the mystery behind Keith's death and just who killed him.

programme.title: See No Evil: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Police investigate the strange disappearance of a reporter in Pensacola, FL who was involved in the world of gaming, and a mother disappears across state. Cameras shed light on these two cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blood Bath
programme.desc: Mother of two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered within her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the unexpected and horrific truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: Shadow of Hope
programme.desc: On December 26th 2011, Hope Melton vanishes after being run off a country road. CCTV footage from a nearby gas station reveals a suspicious orange car that seems to have followed her out of the parking lot.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
