programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Master Suite
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a dated master suite in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Kim and Rob's 18th century house was damaged by a fire and last renovated in the 1980s.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Master Suite in a Barn
programme.desc: John and Tina own a converted 1740s barn and they need help with their awkward master bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1817 Chopped-Up Kitchen
programme.desc: Brandon, the owner of an 1817 stone house, needs help with his kitchen. The kitchen was converted from a side porch in the 1970s, but the strange layout and the materials don't match the rest of the house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1717 Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a kitchen and living area in a rundown 1717 farmhouse. The original hardwood floors are a mess, the foyer and living room are drab and the kitchen addition doesn't match the character of the original house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Rundown 1710 Root Cellar
programme.desc: Angie and Tom recruit Jeff and his team to turn their crumbling 1710 root cellar into a welcoming wine cellar.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: I Want That!: Builders, Kitchen and Bath Show
programme.desc: Be the first in the know about the latest high-tech gadgets and design trends.

programme.desc: Roger's first visit to the 50th state promises big fires and big feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoke and Steam
programme.desc: Roger is invited to two community gatherings abundant with local foods on the Hawaiian Island of Oahu.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South Carolina Surf and Turf

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Roasts
programme.desc: Roger heads to Napa Valley for two unique pig roasts.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Mama Mia, What a Meatball!
programme.desc: Inspired by his mom's cooking, Michael Symon masters chicken parmesan meatballs on the grill. Later, Symon's wife Liz joins him to cook soft polenta over their fire pit. Then, Liz makes a simple vinegar and cream dressing for Michael's mom's garden salad.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: From Boardwalk Barbecue to Lazy Man Lobster
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac, a native of Maine and a lobster roll expert, is in search of the country's most decadent and delicious eats by the seaside. He heads to a bar on Long Island, NY where drinks are served beachside, and then enjoys food as boats arrive.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Burgers, Beaches...Bananas!
programme.desc: In search of decadent eats by the seaside, Sabin Lomac heads to Lulu's a "high class dive" in Gulf Shores, for a fried green tomato pimento cheese burger and Lulu's gumbo.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tokyo
programme.desc: Tokyo, Japan, is a world leader in everything from finance to technology -- and food! In a spectacular city known for such edible icons as sushi and tempura, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: Wabbit
programme.desc: The hilarious and mischievous Bugs Bunny you love is back. He battles wits against, and getting the best of, classic characters like Yosemite Sam and Wile E. Coyote. He'll also encounter new foes and have help from new friends like Bigfoot.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Features the antics of Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Elmer Fudd, Porky Pig, Sylvester, and more.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: The comedic adventures of a duelling cat and mouse that sustain a classic love/ hate relationship.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Spoon in the Stone/ Gonzonocchio
programme.desc: When Rowlf tells a story about the Spoon in the Stone, Animal, Gonzo, and Piggy race off in a quest to become the greatest knight. When Gonzo loses his library book, he tells tall tales to cover the truth.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Everybody Wash Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mongoose Cousin Mystery/ The Marble Egg Mystery
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku's cousins visit Jalpur for a kite festival. Then, when the Prince loses a precious marble gift from the Queen, Mira sets out to find it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Comet / Glowy Moths
programme.desc: PJ Robot persuades the PJ Masks to journey towards a comet. He thinks it’ll give HQ extra power. Luna’s teasing Romeo with her newly super-charged moths and the PJ Masks have to stop her.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Great Gig/ Owlette's New Move
programme.desc: When the school instruments go missing, Owlette and Gekko are hot on the trail. Catboy and Gekko dream up an exciting new superhero move, but Owlette can’t get it right.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: It's Wiki Wiki Time/ Happy Hula Helpers!
programme.desc: Donald's Hawaiian vacation is interrupted when the rest of the gang arrives for a big relay race. The Happy Helpers are tasked with teaching a hula dance for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Vampirina: Oh Brother / The Search for Bigfoot
programme.desc: When Gregoria's soft and sweet brother, Hugo, visits, will the Hauntley's like him more? Uncle Bigfoot misses check-in, so Vee sets Edgar, Bigfoot's biggest fan, out to find him!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Flight of the Ninja / Romeo Coaster
programme.desc: Romeo creates a live video game and the PJ Masks must work with the other villains to stop him. After getting separated, Catboy must face his mistakes alone to defeat Night Ninja.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Message From Mars
programme.desc: Mickey, Goofy, Daisy and Pluto take their Rocket Ship to mars where they help Martian Mickey and his dog Pluto find a Martian Treasure in time for their Twilight Celebration.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Fishy Story
programme.desc: Mickey and crew journey to a waterfall to find Daisy's pet goldfish.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Show and Tell
programme.desc: Martian Mickey pays a visit to the Clubhouse pals and participates in a special show and tell presentation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Hiccups
programme.desc: Daisy, Mickey, Goofy and Pluto all help Donald get rid of his never-ending hiccups.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Gone

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Round-Up
programme.desc: Mickey and pals have to gather the digits to put them back in their box after escaping.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals discover what has been keeping Prince Pete awake, after trying hard to help him fall asleep for a nap. It was a stack of peas under the cushion of his favourite car.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald
programme.desc: When Pluto's bouncy ball bounces all the way into outer space, Mickey and our friends, led by Space Captain Donald, take a trip to the Moon to retrieve the ball.

programme.title: Chuggington: Sleepyhead Koko / Odd Train Out
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Oh, Toodles!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Donald's Garage/ Artful Helpers
programme.desc: While Mickey is away, Donald is left in charge and tries to improve the garage. The Happy Helpers are asked to guard a valuable painting at the Hot Dog Hills' Fancy Art Museum.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mixed-Up for a Day!/ Princess Clarabelle!
programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mongoose Cousin Mystery/ The Marble Egg Mystery
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku's cousins visit Jalpur for a kite festival. Then, when the Prince loses a precious marble gift from the Queen, Mira sets out to find it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Break Dancer/ Bubble Monkey
programme.desc: Bella the Ballerina does a twirl in the air and comes down wrong, cracking her leg; Emmie's Bubble Monkey stops blowing bubbles, so Doc takes her for a check-up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Best, Best Friend / Counting Kermits
programme.desc: When he fears he's losing his BFF, Fozzie tries to prove he's Kermit's BEST best friend. Bunsen and Beaker invent a Make-Another-You-Inator to help Kermit play four games at once.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Across the Universe/ Brit's Picks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences; Brittany's furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Suck Toad/ Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Brittany is preparing a class speech on 'inner beauty' when an endangered species makes its home on her face. Alvin believes that Kevin has a secret crush on one of the Chipettes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: Movie: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The children's classic is brought to the big screen when the Smurfs accidentally invade the human world after being chased out of their own by an evil wizard.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: History of Portshill/ Trio's a Crowd
programme.desc: Ollie summons Lucius Van Horn to act as the Sasquatch, to amp up Portshill's history. When Ollie and Bernie get wrapped up in a video game, Cleo befriends a monster, named Trina.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to make a hole in the wall of the Krusty Krab a drive-thru so he doesn't have to pay for repairs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Secret of Success/ The Doof Side of the Moon
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are building an ATV powerful enough to handle extreme terrains and even buildings. Meanwhile, Candace and Stacy go to a leadership retreat where Candace learns the steps needed to achieve her ultimate goal of busting her brothers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flying High! Harmony Pegasus!
programme.desc: Tango decides to take the Victories on a training journey to battle more powerful Bladers. While Dante meets with the mysterious Pheng Hope, Delta challenges the artistic Blindt DeVoy.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Beauty Is Only Crystal Deep!

programme.title: Movie: Quantum of Solace

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: I'll Be Gone in the Dark: Murder Habit
programme.desc: Writer Michelle McNamara, author of True Crime Diary, her blog about unsolved crimes, finds a new obsession in the 'East Area Rapist' (EAR), who terrorized California in the 1970s and ‘80s, responsible for 50 home-invasion rapes and 12 murders.

programme.title: Movie: Ray
programme.desc: The life story of Ray Charles, who fought prejudice and addiction during his rise to fame.

programme.title: Welcome to Chechnya
programme.desc: In Chechnya, gay and transgender citizens are targeted as part of a deadly 'cleansing' campaign. This film shadows a group of LGBTQ activists risking their lives to confront the ongoing persecution and working undercover to rescue victims.

programme.title: Perry Mason: The Case of the Sleepwalker's Niece
programme.desc: When his extortionist's bother is murdered, Peter is accused because of his sleepwalking.

programme.title: I May Destroy You: That Was Fun
programme.desc: Back in London and two months after the incident, Arabella meets with a therapist who encourages her to find relaxing and creative ways to cope with her trauma.

programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: When the teenage children of a lesbian couple become curious about their biological father, the fabric of the family begins to unravel.

programme.title: Movie: Daylight
programme.desc: An ex-emergency chief must help people escape from a tunnel collapse in New Jersey.

programme.title: Movie: This Means War
programme.desc: Two CIA agents wage war against each other when they find out they have been dating the same woman.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: John and Jane Smith are bored with their domestic life, but both lead a double life. They are deadly assassins, although neither knows about the other, and they are assigned to kill each other after they both miss their latest target.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Searcher
programme.desc: Explore Elvis Presley's evolution as a musician and a man, from his childhood through the final 1976 Jungle Room recording sessions.

programme.title: Movie: Unstoppable
programme.desc: A conductor and a veteran engineer race against the clock to stop an unmanned freight train before it reaches a city and causes a catastrophe.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: Dark Phoenix
programme.desc: Jean Grey develops dangerous powers that make her a risk to the X-Men.

programme.title: Movie: John Q
programme.desc: A man holds a hospital ER hostage when his son is denied care due to a lack of insurance.

programme.title: Movie: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: A gym owner is at risk of losing his business unless he can come up with $50,000. He and some of his less-than-average clientele enter a dodgeball competition in order to raise the funds and save the gym from his rival.

programme.title: Movie: Tolkien
programme.desc: Author J.R.R. Tolkien discovers inspiration, love and friendship during his school years.

programme.title: I'll Be Gone in the Dark: Murder Habit
programme.desc: Writer Michelle McNamara, author of True Crime Diary, her blog about unsolved crimes, finds a new obsession in the 'East Area Rapist' (EAR), who terrorized California in the 1970s and ‘80s, responsible for 50 home-invasion rapes and 12 murders.

programme.title: Perry Mason: The Case of the Sleepwalker's Niece
programme.desc: When his extortionist's bother is murdered, Peter is accused because of his sleepwalking.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Two years after the Las Vegas bachelor party, the guys head to Thailand for Stu's wedding. However, Stu's plans for a quiet brunch are derailed.

programme.title: Movie: Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: A small high school team is brought together by their Friday night football games. Their coach inspires hope among them, and finds a way to help his players find the courage and the strength to make it through to the state semi-finals.

programme.title: Movie: Hall Pass
programme.desc: Two best friends are granted permission by their wives to have extramarital affairs, but when their wives join in on the fun things get a little out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Green Lantern
programme.desc: When a test pilot is given a magical ring, he inherits supernatural powers. With this ring comes the responsibility to become part of an interspatial battalion that is charged with creating peace among the universe.

programme.title: Movie: U-571
programme.desc: The crew of a U.S. submarine are selected for a mission to take over a crippled U-boat.

programme.title: Movie: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: A golden retriever narrates his life story and describes his bond with an aspiring race car driver.

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Movie: American Pie
programme.desc: A group of high-school seniors enter a pact to lose their virginity before graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Unforgiven
programme.desc: A retired assassin hunts down renegade cowboys to avenge the brutal cutting and rape of a prostitute.

programme.title: Movie: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: When the leader of a band of outlaws is captured, an impoverished rancher with a debt to pay agrees to escort the outlaw to a train bound for Yuma.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Bucky F**kin' Dent
programme.desc: Ray is L.A.'s best professional 'trouble shooter', he can make anything disappear.

programme.title: City on a Hill: The Wickedness of the Wicked Shall Be Upon Himself

programme.desc: A pampered female detective who firmly believes anything a man can do a woman can do just as well swaps lives with an obedient, stay-at-home wife and mom who believes her role in life is to fulfill her husband's every command and take care of her family.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Harvey-Woodruff Family
programme.desc: The Harvey-Woodruff residence is transforming before our eyes.

programme.title: The Closer: Unknown Trouble
programme.desc: A murder investigation leads the team to the owner of a music label; Brenda is sued.

programme.title: The Closer: Repeat Offender
programme.desc: Brenda and her team investigate the murder of a young girl who was house-sitting.

programme.title: The Closer: To Serve With Love
programme.desc: Flynn and Provenza decide to make easy money by serving court papers for a lawyer.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Born to Run
programme.desc: The Boston Marathon turns into a crime scene when a shooter begins targeting runners. Racing to catch the killer before another shooting, Jane and Maura must conduct their investigation in secret to avoid panic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I'm Your Boogie Man
programme.desc: A body discovered in a park appears to be the work of Charles Hoyt, the imprisoned serial killer who once abducted and nearly murdered Jane. As Maura struggles to get inside the mind of the killer, Jane must keep her fear in check.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Honeymoon Countdown
programme.desc: Host Jamie Otis counts down the top moments, in various categories, on a journey back through 10 seasons of 'Married at First Sight' honeymoons.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Australia: Season 7, Episode 5
programme.desc: Australia's biggest social experiment continues with the experts matching another two couples: Aleks and Ivan, and Connie and Jonethen.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Australia: Season 7, Episode 6
programme.desc: The final four brave singles walk down the aisle, with a standoffish bride and a bombshell revelation that could end a marriage before it’s begun.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Australia: Season 7, Episode 7
programme.desc: The final four couples head off on their honeymoons where Connie chases her first kiss with Jonethen and Ivan chases his lost mobile phone.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Oklahoma City Bombing
programme.desc: In 1995, a federal building in Oklahoma City was torn apart by a powerful truck bomb killing 168 people. The man responsible was a decorated war hero who had turned against his own government.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber
programme.desc: Writing style reveals Unabomber's identity when Ted Kaczynski's sister-in-law recognizes his phrasing in his manifesto.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators retrace the hikers' last steps. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Mother Russia
programme.desc: Josh goes behind the Iron Curtain (while staying in his spare bedroom) to explore the cultures and mysteries of the USSR with celebrity guests and expert interviews.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship
programme.desc: When a mummy is discovered on an abandoned boat, investigators struggle to explain where it came from. Jeremy Wade reveals what happened and the strange forces to blame for this mysterious phenomenon on the high seas.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators retrace the hikers' last steps. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Volcano Nightmare
programme.desc: Jake, our former Navy SEAL, is ambushed and dumped atop a volcano in Iceland. Facing deadly avalanche fields, boiling mud pits and sulphuric geysers, Jake could lose more than the game when he makes a near-fatal error in the land of fire and ice.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Embrace the Suck
programme.desc: Terry, our Green Beret, is ambushed on vacation and tossed out of an airplane into the middle of the ocean in the Gulf of Mexico. Facing the threat of dehydration and freezing conditions, will Terry's training help him survive the challenge and find land?

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Arctic Disaster
programme.desc: Primitive skills expert and endurance athlete Matt is captured and dropped into chest-deep snow in the Arctic Circle. Wearing nothing but his buckskin shorts and sandals, he has to fight through a frozen swamp of snow to find his way back to civilization.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Curse of the Swamp: Part One
programme.desc: Jeremy, a former Naked and Afraid survivalist returns for his chance at redemption in the infamous haunted swamps of Louisiana and is joined by determined Michelle, an Air Force veteran. When trouble hits the partnership early on the episode takes a turn.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Curse of the Swamp: Part Two
programme.desc: Jeremy and Melanie continue the hardest challenge of their lives in the infamous haunted swamps of Louisiana. They must endure constant threats from predators, while desperately trying to secure food to keep them going in this forsaken wilderness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire and Fury
programme.desc: Survivalists Angela and Chad are stalked by leopards and unable to get fire as they fight the elements in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Unhinged
programme.desc: An ex-marine and a perky Southern girl attempt to survive three weeks in the Panamanian Jungle. Constant downpours, cabin fever, threats from predators, lack of sleep and extreme hunger soon take its toll on one of them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: King of the Forest
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed 'King of the forest' and a skilled endurance athlete take on the Alabama backwoods. They secure shelter and fire on Day 1, but once hunger kicks in it pushes one of them to do something we've never seen on Naked and Afraid before.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rise Above
programme.desc: An openly gay horse trainer and an anxious wilderness instructor take on the daunting jungle of Amazonia. Constant rain and a lack of resources make one survivalist hit rock bottom quickly, while the other is forced to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Hunted
programme.desc: A mother of four and a country boy are dropped into the jaguar filled jungle of Belize. While they hunt for food, something is hunting them, and the mental part of the challenge gets to them both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fan Down
programme.desc: A freak injury puts super-fan survivalists Maci and Justin at risk as they attempt to survive the treacherous Nicaraguan jungle for 14 days.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Sarah's Story
programme.desc: After a difficult childhood with an abusive stepfather and drug-addicted mother, Sarah weighs over 600-lbs and is fighting for her life at only 24 years old.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Rena and Lee's Story
programme.desc: Lee and Rena are battling health and anger issues while taking a desperate, second attempt to save their relationship and their lives.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lee, Rena and Sarah
programme.desc: Lee's anger issues continue to jeopardize his relationship with Rena and threatens to derail both of their weight loss journeys, while a major life event sends Sarah into a depression, and she must pull herself out of if she wants to keep losing weight.

programme.title: Counting On: Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: With the due date near, Jinger and Jeremy get ready to meet baby Vuolo. Meanwhile, John whisks Abbie away on a surprise trip to ask for her hand in marriage. Later, Jinger's labor takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Counting On: Jinger Has a Baby
programme.desc: The hills are alive for Josiah and Lauren as they go on their Austrian honeymoon. While there, they re-enact scenes from 'The Sound of Music' and visit with a local family. Meanwhile, Jinger worries she won't have the smooth labor she was hoping for.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Six-ring Circus
programme.desc: As the Waldrop family prepares to celebrate Halloween like never before, the sextuplets get an early start on the chaotic 'terrible twos.' Meanwhile, the babies get their first haircut, and Courtney and Eric debate the next phase of their remodel.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Karate Kids
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric start the babies in preschool to help with their development but worry about leaving them. The older boys try karate but face a tough decision when it comes time to choose between their other sports. Courtney and Eric tour mobile homes.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Time for Time Outs
programme.desc: It's time-out time at the Waldrop house as Courtney and Eric start disciplining the sextuplets. The big boys are treated to a fun getaway, leaving Ramona and Popsie alone with all six babies. The family receives shocking news about their new mobile home.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Cheap Hair Day
programme.desc: Kelley saves money by insulating her entire house with plastic. Now, she's bringing her Pilates studio into the home to save $800 per month. Pelin cuts hair and costs at her salon and must find cheap bridal party products to trim her budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: This Is Where I Lay My Head
programme.desc: A woman accused of murder cracks under the pressure of jail life and attacks staff members. A pregnant inmate finds herself in the middle of a jailhouse brawl.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: The Nature of the Beast
programme.desc: A former United States Marine works through the fallout of her addiction; a woman involved in a drug cartel seeks redemption.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: A newcomer to jail turns to a more experienced inmate for comfort, but gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: A Safe Place
programme.desc: Two best friends share a heroin addiction and go repeatedly through the system; a prostitute struggles to overcome her past.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: It Was Supposed to Be a Happy Day
programme.desc: Two incarcerated heroin addicts turn to each other for support. A life of prostitution supports a young woman's drug habit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan Sheckler
programme.desc: Skateboarding pro Ryan Sheckler joins Rob to look at some heated sibling rivalries and show us how to avoid skateboard missiles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXXIX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo earn a gold medal in 'ginastics', study some beasts that are 'wildly intelligent', and learn what trends are 'hot in China'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sage the Gemini
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper and producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's 'glide or die,' get 'over gassed' and announce to the world 'I love sparks.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness motorcycle revenge in Moto-Cide. Watch some unevolved Cave People, and experience twice the pain in Adding Injury to Injury.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Terrence J
programme.desc: The host of MTV's 'Safeword' and 'Are You The One,' Terrence J, joins Rob, Steelo.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: A$AP Ferg
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steele invite rap icon A$AP Ferg closer to the action in 'floor seats,' discuss what it's like to have 'grill problems,' and see who can put their 'wigs on the floor.'

programme.title: The Challenge: Your Time is Gonna Come
programme.desc: Aneesa worries that her Red Skull may be in jeopardy when players wonder if she has what it takes to run a Final. Fessy makes a questionable move against his alliance. A nighttime challenge and another double elimination shock the remaining players.

programme.title: Revenge Prank: The Prank that Fell from the Sky
programme.desc: Pauly D helps Garrick get revenge on his wife Zoe by pulling off the ultimate skydive prank. The stakes are sky high and will push the boundaries of their marriage.

programme.title: Revenge Prank: The Prank with the Unexpected Delivery
programme.desc: Vinny helps sisters Tamika and Kehonia prank their embarrassing mom Madeline. Her maternal instincts will be pushed to the limit when she shows up to find Tamika in the back of an ambulance. Buckle up!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Bananas
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome MTV legend Johnny Bananas to witness some 'big betrayals', get into it with 'roommate drama' and check out some folks who are obstacle course 'challenged'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling L
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some Bro Burials, hang with a crew of Lil' Trunkies and teach us a trend called Speed Bumping.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jackson Nicoll

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXXVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo help people sleep with some "Slumber Slaps," learn that all pets believe "Humans are Crazy," and take one on the chin in "Chinjuries."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kat Graham
programme.desc: Actress and musical artist, Kat Graham, shows us some of her big moments of One Liners and how to dance on stage with one shoe. Rob also shows videos of her Magical Spells.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the snack zone, learn the dangers of hiring budget babysitters and root on reckless golf cart drivers in 'country club drift.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Skies
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Lil Skies joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to meet some next level Shelbys, see the effects of sa-bro-tage, and get off the hook.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel laugh at some cute "Kittiots," support some people who just "Wanna Rassle," and check out some "Slippery Crooks."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black II
programme.desc: Big Black is back and he's showing off Black Lavender. See what happens When Bad Ideas Go Worse and people suffer a Failure to Launch.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: VMA Moments
programme.desc: On a special VMA episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo pay tribute to the great VMA moments with some guitar-tossing Ax Wounds, butt-baring Moon People, and unreal Cardi babies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Happy Everything Episode
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through 'Black and Blue Friday,' 'Gettin' Ugly,' with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some 'Human Driedels.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to Lake Painatonka, catch the quick hands in Grabbies and watch some unsuspecting people get Effed from behind.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyler and Taco
programme.desc: Tyler, the Creator and Loiter Squad co-star, Taco, visit the set of Ridiculousness and learn about Sloppy Finishes and Faceballs.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Smosh
programme.desc: YouTube stars Smosh expose some 'secret commandos,' showcase the hilarity of getting 'shut up' and help highlight 'why men shouldn't twerk.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Love, Hugs and Slams
programme.desc: Rob takes a look at Ridiculousness' most romantic moments; from overly amorous make outs to the most passionate of slams.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ja Rule
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to 'keep it on the green,' run in terror from 'Ja Ghouls' and be driven crazy by 'these damn kids.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 100th
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel celebrate the 100th episode of Ridiculousness by getting 'popcorned,' trying not to catch 'heavy leg syndrome,' and having some good old-fashioned 'redneck good times.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling VIII
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling, and Chanel explore the fun side of 'chatter gas', experience some 'no pros' going down, and expose the true feelings in 'surprise, I hate you.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Duff Goldman
programme.desc: The star chef drops by with a scorpion cake. He and Rob show videos of 'grand entrances' and 'ghost hotels'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXIII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob's Parents
programme.desc: Patty and Gene, Rob's parents, come to the set to watch videos of their kids' pranks.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Going to Italia
programme.desc: The housemates pack up their hair extensions and their Shore Store t-shirts and jet off to Italy for a European adventure. But the culture shock that awaits them is nothing compared to their shocking new hook-ups.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Like More Than a Friend
programme.desc: Deena and Pauly consider the consequences should they smush, while Mike tries to take his friendship with Snooki to the next level. At the club, Ron and Sammi try to be friends but prove that old habits, both good and bad, die hard.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Twinning
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on Mike and Vinny. Plus Mike's secret hook-up with Snooki is revealed. Is Snooki a cheater or is The Situation just trying to start drama?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed, leading her to anxiety and self doubt about her relationship with the roommates. Ronnie and Sam are back to their old ways, but this time Mike is involved in their mess.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: And the Wall Won
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ron and Sam for years, Mike comes to blows with Ronnie and ends up getting carried out on a stretcher.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fist Pump, Pushups, Chapstick
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny put on a 'Guido-themed' comedy show, while Ron and Sam work once again to patch things up. Snooki becomes so distraught over her rollercoaster long-distance relationship that Jenni and Sam decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Meatball Mashup
programme.desc: When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki and Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. And when everyone returns to Florence, Team Meatballs literally have a run in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where Is My Boyfriend?
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatballs from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's true love Jionni comes to visit, what starts as a romantic evening ends with a sobbing Snooki alone in the streets of Florence.

programme.desc: Pete's decision to compete in ultimate fighting forces Monica to make an important decision about their relationship. Phoebe sets Ross up on a date with a woman who used to be bald.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Bubble Baby!
