programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Baiting Game/ The Killer's Tattoo
programme.desc: Investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist when probing a murder case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Missing Informant/ Man's Best Friend
programme.desc: A murder is solved when a skeleton is found; a dead dog's DNA helps solve a case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Deja Vu/ Secret in the Well
programme.desc: A fingerprint identification system helps solve a murder; a 16-year-old murder is solved when the victim's body is found at the bottom of a well.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Officer Down
programme.desc: The longest running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark, who was shot execution style in his own home. It took 33 years to discover the truth.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killer on Campus/ The Bow Hunter
programme.desc: In 1969, a first-year law student is found shot twice in the head with nylon stockings wrapped around her neck, but police are unable to find the killer until they get a hand from DNA evidence 31 years later. A man confesses to killing a hunter.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Deadly Stroll/ Unholy Secret
programme.desc: In Rhode Island, policewomen go undercover as street walkers to nab the man suspected of murdering three prostitutes. And a dagger-shaped letter opener is the key piece of evidence that links a priest to the grisly 1980 murder of a nun in Toledo.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Killer's Skin/ Where's Peggy?
programme.desc: A killer who usually targets older women is suspected in the murder of an elderly man. The contents of a secret storage shed hold the grisly clues to a murder that has gone cold for more than 14 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: New Orleans detective Ryan Vaught investigates a gruesome and horrific murder: a grandmother and her 4-year-old grandson shot in her bedroom, leaving the grandmother dead and the 4-year-old struggling to survive.

programme.title: The First 48: A Simple Plan/ Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: An attempted car jacking in Cleveland leaves an innocent man shot dead. Then, a home invasion turns deadly when a woman is murdered in front of her daughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Chris Webber vs. Bo the Fan
programme.desc: Broadcasting legend Rich Eisen shows one fan there's no such thing as a free lunch, an interactive video game gets a little too realistic, and Chris Webber teams up with former teammate Lou Williams to get things popping.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Connor Fields vs. Taina the Fan
programme.desc: Josh Norman goes undercover again to talk about how much he hates Josh Norman, and one fan gets a wild ride with BMX legend Connor Fields.

programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.desc: Todd takes the family to a rustic resort for Independence Day, but gets mocked for his outdoor skills. Meanwhile, Chase and Parker become the source of major fireworks.

programme.desc: Charlotte's battle with her mother-in-law explodes; Samantha's relationship gets a boost.

programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family Feud
programme.desc: Kourtney is devastated when Scott introduces the kids to his girlfriend without her permission. Meanwhile the family is determined to redeem themselves on Celebrity Family Feud at all costs, and Kim encounters an issue with her selfie taking.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: We Love Chicago
programme.desc: Kim prepares for the birth of her third child, Khloé struggles to choose a godparent for her baby, and Kourtney makes her dancing debut in a flash mob.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Perfect Stormi

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: An American Model in Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is furious when Kim leaks some personal information about her to the family. Meanwhile Kim struggles to make Kanye a priority, and Kendall lets loose on a whirlwind trip to Paris.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We offer 4th of July celebration tips.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Save JJ's
programme.desc: Leslie holds a rally in an attempt to keep JJ's Diner from closing. Tom surprises Donna with the ultimate pre-wedding gift.

programme.title: House: Dying Changes Everything
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Amber's death, Wilson announces his resignation. The team must push forward as they encounter a case involving an assistant to a high-profile executive whose symptoms may stem from her obsession to please her boss.

programme.title: House: Not Cancer
programme.desc: When several people die suddenly and without warning five years after receiving transplants from a single organ donor, House and the team rush to save the only two surviving recipients. With one already dying, the team must find out what was wrong.

programme.title: House: Adverse Events
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of a struggling artist who has been painting bizarre portraits. His undiagnosed illness is distorting his perception and threatening to undermine his career, relationships and everything else in his life.

programme.title: House: Birthmarks
programme.desc: House receives word that his father has passed away and initially dismisses the idea of going to the funeral. While en route, House must work with the team via phone to help diagnose a woman who collapsed while searching for her birth parents in China.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Seafood Battle
programme.desc: Four seafood specialists battle it out in Flavortown. Guy Fieri limits the chefs to just ten ingredients in the first round, and then all the ingredients for their second dish must start with the same random letter.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Kitchen Heroes
programme.desc: Charity is important at Flavortown Market, where most of the unused food is donated to local food shelters after each competition. With that in mind, Guy Fieri decides to showcase chefs who are giving back to their own communities every day.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Stars' Full Meal
programme.desc: When celebrity chefs come to Flavortown, Guy Fieri gets to try out his most twisted games, and this time he's really putting them to the test with full, three-course meals.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Island Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri shares his passion for island food by inviting four island-born chefs to cook up some delightful dishes in Flavortown. Challenges include tiny bags for picking up the ingredients required for their signature seafood dishes and blind choice.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG RAW
programme.desc: Four superstar chefs compete in a one-game showdown that incorporates three of Guy Fieri's craziest challenges. Guy reveals an in-depth look at how each over-the-top comfort food dish comes together and shares behind-the-scenes secrets of GGG.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Spicy Games
programme.desc: Guy welcomes back the winners of previous GGG spicy competitions and pits them against each other. Three chefs make their spiciest and hometown heat dishes until only one is left standing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Busted
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens patrol the southern border for illegal fishing activity and the northern border for a trapper who may be selling live coyotes. Game Wardens go undercover to stop someone suspected of harassing deer hunters.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: Across the state, Texas game wardens are busy enforcing fish and game law. An injured bald eagle needs medical attention. Game wardens go undercover to catch someone selling illegal alligator parts. A tip leads to an angler with multiple undersized fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Residential Gator
programme.desc: Wardens Richards and Freed halt a marijuana grow hidden in a wildlife preserve. After attacking a family dog, Warden Hall relocates a 500-lb gator, and at a school a mother alligator and her hatchlings are captured and relocated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Run
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Hannett pursues an unusual recreational vehicle in a high speed chase. Officer Pushee and Trainee Driscoll encounter a group of combative speedsters and Officer Lucas races to the scene of an ATV crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Black Market Border Patrol
programme.desc: The Texas game wardens have one of the most dangerous jobs in the state, and it only gets tougher when they're on border patrol, and hot on the tail of a large-scale poaching operation.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Just One More ...
programme.desc: The rule is clear: one hunter one deer. But some hunters are greedy and the wardens are there to stop them. Plus, a deputy joins his first night-hunting stakeout, LaFlamme searches for an arrow that can help solve a mystery and a family covers up a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The End Is Near
programme.desc: A Facebook post leads the wardens to a gang of poachers, which turns into a manhunt when the ringleader skips bail. The wardens capture a flock of nuisance wild turkeys and search all night for a rabbit hunter lost in the snowy woods.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Toughest Job in Texas
programme.desc: An alligator poacher brags online and Wardens go after him. Down on the border Wardens pull illegal nets from the river while looking for drug smugglers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Busted
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens patrol the southern border for illegal fishing activity and the northern border for a trapper who may be selling live coyotes. Game Wardens go undercover to stop someone suspected of harassing deer hunters.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way
programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Keyshia Cole's Dream Tank
programme.desc: R&B singer Keyshia Cole is literally dreaming of a beautiful saltwater aquarium in her home and wants to make it a reality.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Fast and the Fishiest
programme.desc: Lusso Auto Spa designs customizations for high end and rare vehicles, now they want an exotic fish tank that matches their automobiles. They've requested a massive 14 foot, three sided wonder that will sit amidst their multi-million dollar cars.

programme.title: Tanked!: Clay Matthews' Green Bay Eel Tank
programme.desc: Clay Matthews from the Green Bay Packers is in the process of building his dream home and it wouldn't be complete without a custom tank. Clay's wife wants the interior to stay classy but with subtle references to his Green Bay playing career.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nacho Average Fish Tanks
programme.desc: Snap On Tools is hosting their annual convention and needs ATM's help to wow their attendees. They send one of their giant tool storage chests to Vegas to get the signature tank treatment.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fernando Vargas's Knockout Tank
programme.desc: Three-time world champion boxer Fernando Vargas asks Wayde and Brett to make a boxing-glove shaped tank for his boxing gym in Las Vegas. But this challenge goes well beyond the ring.

programme.title: Tanked!: Party Rockin' Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for world famous artist and DJ Redfoo of the band LMFAO. The guys attempt their very first one-of-a-kind DJ booth aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Extreme Pond Off! Wayde vs. Brett
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are going head to head on this one. They both want a one of a kind, extreme pond in their backyard. This dynamic duo is keeping everything top secret from each other. Only one family can reign supreme.

programme.title: Property Brothers: New Parents Go Big With a Blinged-Out Pad
programme.desc: With a busy schedule and crazy commute, new parents Katie and Justin spend weekends in their downtown home and crash at his parents' place during the week. Now, they are looking for a blinged-out suburban pad.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Why Did We Wait So Long?
programme.desc: Brits Niki and Neil are expats living in Texas who are looking for the perfect vacation home in the Bahamas for their busy family. Between parenting two kids and Neil running his own company, the family is always on the move.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: This Is Not Los Angeles
programme.desc: A London-born woman searches for a private sanctuary away from her busy life in Los Angeles on Eleuthera.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: A First Time for Everything
programme.desc: A Cincinnati couple decides to move out of the houseboat they've lived in for 31 years and buy their very first land home on the Berry Islands.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Bimini Bliss
programme.desc: Jet ski enthusiasts hunt for a Bahamian getaway they can ride to from their Florida home and feel Bimini's close proximity is the perfect fit. However, they must decide between North Bimini's laid-back vibes or the more energetic scene in South Bimini.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Recharging on Exuma
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple longs for a place where they can escape the hectic lifestyles they lead. Drawn by the beautiful waters, stunning scenery and secluded beaches, they look to Exuma for their piece of paradise.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Time to Come Home
programme.desc: After spending a few years in the U.S., a Bahamian couple has realized that they miss the islands. Returning to Nassau doesn't feel right, so they're looking to move to laid-back Eleuthera. They have big plans and want a big home to accommodate them.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Family Reunion
programme.desc: A Washington, DC, couple is looking for a second home with a sense of community in Nassau. They're looking for a place large enough to comfortably accommodate visiting friends and family, and an ocean view and beach access is a must.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Turn Key in Treasure Cay
programme.desc: After over a decade of renting and staying with friends in Treasure Cay, Sandy and Rande feel it is finally time to lay down roots in their Bahamian home away from home.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Paradise Found

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Renovation Island: When It Rains, It Pours
programme.desc: Bryan begins work on the two bedroom villa and the crew repairs the hotel block roof. A delayed shipment pushes back the construction schedule. And after a major rainstorm, the Baeumlers make a difficult decision about the opening date.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Power Struggle
programme.desc: Progress continues on the villas, but Bryan and Sarah butt heads over priorities. When Bryan has to leave the site for a few days, Sarah is left in charge. Adam and Bryan race the clock to pay their power bill.

programme.desc: Documenting how surveillance cameras assist with solving crime in America.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder On The Home Front
programme.desc: When 25 year old veteran Brandon Horst is found with a bullet through his head, it looks like the fallen hero has succumbed to PTSD. But when the case is revealed to be a homicide, police must untangle a vicious conspiracy that hits close to home.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sins of the Heart
programme.desc: Young, rich, and religious, John and Nikki Hillrich fall in love at college. It's a match made in heaven- but hell is not far off. When desire collides with faith, secret lives marked by sinful liaisons and menacing new friends shatter their perfect life.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Tom and Juanita give their love one more shot when they take a second honeymoon. But for the Richardsons, there are no second chances-just a sharp cliff with a long way to fall.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in Vegas
programme.desc: John and Evie Watson manage to bridge the gap between their ages, cultures and languages. But after more than a quarter century of marriage-the pillars of their love have crumbled to pieces causing tempers to flare and secrets to be uncovered.

programme.title: Betrayed: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Driven by youth, music, and her faith, Janet Chandler has dreams and aspirations of a life much larger than the small Midwestern town where she grew up. Sadly, those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: 20-year-old Missy Grubaugh, a devout Christian, is saving herself for marriage. But Missy's innocent charms attract the wrong type of men… with deadly results.

programme.title: Betrayed: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Handsome Morris Blankenbaker, small town sports legend, is a happy family man… until he gets thrust into a love triangle with his best friend and gorgeous wife. Hidden rivalries and simmering jealousies surface, leading to Morris's chilling death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blinded by Betrayal
programme.desc: Yelena Zakin's dream life is upturned by her husband Andrew's interest in his new, scheming secretary, her strange fiancé, and Andrew's ambitious protégé. For Yelena, it's a lethal combination.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: An illicit affair between a bank executive and his secretary turns deadly when the soon-to-be ex-wife uncovers their romance.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. His infatuation leads to obsession and when their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Locked Up
programme.desc: A single mom looking for a fresh start takes a job as a prison nurse. An encounter with an inmate leads to an illicit love affair. But their relationship is strictly forbidden and when it is discovered the pair take drastic action to stay together.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.desc: The fur flies when Aphrodite and Bethany take on Kelly and Noelle.

programme.desc: Competitive friends, Laura and Kim are putting their flipping skills to the test against college buddies, Drew and Justin.

programme.desc: The husband and wife team Al and Merry, duke it out with best friends Erika and Evey.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flippin' Feathers
programme.desc: An engaged couple go up against some creative friends.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts. He starts in Chattanooga, Tennessee where Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián has an incredible collection of portable rigs to create fantastical live-fire events.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Tasty Taverns
programme.desc: Grab a seat at the bar and enjoy a pint at these tasty taverns! A French-trained chef is slinging quality Mexican fare in NOLA and a tavern in Chicago is serving up big beer and bold burgers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flame On!
programme.desc: We're firing up like an inferno and hitting a variety of dishes across the United States that have all the flame in their game! In Santa Monica, California, a burger joint is putting heat to their meat with a sauce made from guava and habanero peppers.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Smoked, Stuffed and Frozen Finds
programme.desc: Chef Brad Miller visits an Orange County food truck with a custom smoker on board. Then he heads to Austin, Texas, to try classic Cajun dishes with a twist. Finally, in Los Angeles, he discovers an ice cream truck without a freezer.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Cheesy, Fresh And Fried
programme.desc: Food truck aficionado chef Brad Miller starts off in Durham, N.C., with a visit to American Meltdown, a food truck where chef Paul Inserra is surprising customers with his innovative and mouthwatering spins on the classic grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Comfort
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America. He's in the kitchen revealing comfort-loving chefs' soul-warming secrets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best spicy foods in restaurants across the country. He's in the kitchen with spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America and revealing their tongue-scorching secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Foods in Jamaica
programme.desc: The search for fire and food takes us to Jamaica where we make a beeline for Scotchies's Too, a restaurant famous for cooking jerk pork and chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carolina 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger heads to North and South Carolina to visit a few restaurants to have upheld the long tradition of barbecuing. At Sweatman's in Holly Hill, whole hogs are cooked and chopped into perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas
programme.desc: Today, Roger is making his way through Texas for live-fire Latin American cooking and smoked European-style sausages.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Wicked King and the Mean Queen/ Take a Stroll!
programme.desc: To settle a dispute about who should get a royal ball, the Wicked King and the Mean Queen play a game of 'Find the Hidden Gold Coins.'/ When the toys are doing an obstacle course, they encourage Tessie, a doll in a stroller to join them.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Animal Gets the Sneezies/ Library Leapfrog
programme.desc: When Animal gets a case of the sneezies, he doesn't want to go to the doctor. In preparation for their library trip, Piggy and Summer show Robin all the wonderful places books can take you.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Curiosity/ House Pest
programme.desc: Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he pulls one too many practical jokes on Simon.When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient; Jeanette and the Chipmunks try to rescue a chimpanzee Bocarter keeps in a cage.

programme.title: Movie: The Smurfs 2

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: The Chosening/ Crush it Ollie

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out

programme.title: Movie: The Thomas Crown Affair

programme.desc: When a law student stumbles onto a conspiracy to assassinate two Supreme Court Justices, she must flee those who want to keep her silent.

programme.title: The National Parks: America's Best Idea: Going Home (1920-1933)
programme.desc: The creation of automobiles increased the traffic to the parks from rich Americans, able to afford train trips, to everyday Americans looking for adventure. Mather embraces this and builds roads in the parks. Lumberjacks begin cutting down Smoky Mountain.

programme.title: Prehistoric Road Trip: Tiny Teeth, Fearsome Beasts
programme.desc: Join Emily on the rest of her adventure, discovering surprising truths hidden in the fossil record.

programme.title: Nature: Spy in the Wild: Friendship
programme.desc: Spy Creatures and their new wild friends rely on each other to look out for predators. A Spy Meerkat babysits meerkat pups while a Spy Cobra pretends to attack the mob. Spy Crocs witness a convenient partnership between real crocodiles and birds.

programme.title: Nova: Australia's First 4 Billion Years: Monsters
programme.desc: Titanic dinosaurs, giant kangaroos and sea monsters highlight Australia's origins.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Kinesthetic Awareness
programme.desc: Focus on the importance of kinesthetic awareness and weight shifting as they relate to balance.

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/ D.W. Unties the Knot

programme.title: Curious George: Monkey Hoedown/ Curious George Clowns Around
programme.desc: When George accidentally ruins the Man with the Yellow Hat's guitar, he and Allie decide to make a new one. When George and the Man with the Yellow Hat visit the Clown College to see Pepe El Loco's Big Show, George gets mistaken for a messenger clown.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: To Touch a Hummingbird
programme.desc: Martin and Chris realise the hummingbird might be the ultimate flier.

programme.title: Hero Elementary: Sound of Ice Cream/ The Reflection Connection
programme.desc: A school for budding superheroes, where kids learn to master their innate powers.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: King Run/ The Native Youth Olympics
programme.desc: Molly and Tooey must help Grandpa Nat fix the broken fish wheel, but have a bigger problem when it goes missing. Then, Molly wants to put a team together to win a gold medal for the Native Youth Olympics.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Helen Keller/ I Am Alexander Graham Bell
programme.desc: Our heroes meet someone incredible, who had to overcome a lot to learn how to do just about anything: Helen Keller; Brad takes his friends to meet someone who worked his whole life to help people be heard: Alexander Graham Bell.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Bob the Plant/ Aren't We a Pair?
programme.desc: Leo's plant 'Bob' is sick, and Leo must find out what's wrong to save him.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel's Bicycle/ Katerina's Magic Trick
programme.desc: Dad Tiger gives Daniel his old bicycle, and Daniel is eager to ride it.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: The Wild Wolf Pack: Putt-ing It Together
programme.desc: A lovable, oversized canine, Clifford, emphasizes good citizenship and community.

programme.title: Sesame Street: The Big Pretend Band
programme.desc: Bert learns how to pretend to play a saxophone so he can be in a pretend band.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Peterrific/ Mother's Day Surprise
programme.desc: Peter builds the tallest block tower ever, all the way to the moon and has so much fun that he doesn't want to come down; Pinkalicious and Peter want to do something extra special for Mother's Day.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: The Final
programme.desc: Find out who will be crowned the winner after they wrestle with meringues, undertake a British classic with only one recipe instruction and no measurements, and tackle one of the most complex challenges ever seen on the series.

programme.title: The White House: Inside Story
programme.desc: Gain access to America's most iconic residence, a symbol of history and an icon of democracy. From the Oval Office to the family dining room, through national crises and world wars, the 200-year story of the White House is the story of America itself.

programme.title: The Lawrence Welk Show: County Fair
programme.desc: Celebrate the fun of a county fair including 'Cotton Candy and a Toy Balloon,' to the clowns and the marching band.

programme.desc: The Pteranodon Family decides to take a little vacation and swaps nests with a family of pterosaurs.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Amazing Eyes/ Water Walkers
programme.desc: Sally and Nick work to find a wild guinea pig while learning about different ways to see things.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Folly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Girls Disappeared

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Producer's Backend
programme.desc: Amaro reports to the scene of a car crash where a Hollywood starlet tries to flirt her way out of an arrest. Amaro tries to investigate the starlet for statutory rape, but Benson believes there is an underlying issue.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intimidation Game

programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: The Job
programme.desc: The office is still buzzing from the events of their day at the beach. A job opening in Corporate pits coworker against coworker as Michael, Jim and Karen all head to New York for final interviews.

programme.title: The Office: Fun Run
programme.desc: A freak accident causes Michael to believe the office is cursed. He explores the religious beliefs of his employees before deciding to hold a charity fun run. Meanwhile, developments in the romances of Pam and Jim, and Dwight and Angela are explored.

programme.title: The Office: Fun Run
programme.desc: A freak accident causes Michael to believe the office is cursed. He explores the religious beliefs of his employees before deciding to hold a charity fun run. Meanwhile, developments in the romances of Pam and Jim, and Dwight and Angela are explored.

programme.title: The Office: Dunder-Mifflin Infinity
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of Michael and many of the employees, Ryan returns to the Scranton branch of Dunder Mifflin to bring the company into the digital age.

programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Local Ad
programme.desc: Michael jumps at the chance to display his creativity in an upcoming Dunder Mifflin ad. Meanwhile, Dwight explores the online world of Second Life.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi-Def Jam
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paint Misbehavin
programme.desc: Deacon has a paintball birthday party; Carrie tells Doug she finds Deacon attractive.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deacon Blues
programme.desc: Doug is surprised to find his married best friend, Deacon, out with another woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inner Tube
programme.desc: Doug's guilty conscience leads to a spoof in which he appears on a number of TV shows.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Papa Pill
programme.desc: Doug takes his turn as Arthur's caretaker and finds it a challenging and difficult task.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Package Deal
programme.desc: Doug quits his job to work for a competitor and Carrie develops a tanning cream addiction.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Departure Time
programme.desc: When Doug goes to meet his parents at the airport, they ask him to sign their living will.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Swim Neighbors
programme.desc: Carrie plunges into a lawsuit with the neighbours who have built a swimming pool.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'no Job
programme.desc: Doug helps his cousin Danny get a job at IPS; Arthur joins a film focus group.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pregnant Pause
programme.desc: An evening of romance between Carrie and Doug results in a totally unexpected surprise.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pregnant Pause

programme.title: The King of Queens: Walk, Man
programme.desc: In order to spend more time with Carrie, Doug hires Spence's dog walker to walk Arthur.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sight Gag
programme.desc: Doug gives Carrie laser eye surgery for her birthday, but she is left temporarily blinded.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mean Streak
programme.desc: Doug is about to break the record for the highest number of consecutive deliveries.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Friender Bender
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's friendship with Victor and Kelly is tested after Doug hits their car.

programme.title: The King of Queens: No Retreat
programme.desc: Doug goes with Carrie on her company retreat while Arthur is left to fend for himself.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made
programme.desc: A look at the dealmakers and hangers-on surrounding convicted serial killer Aileen Wuornos known as ''America's first female serial killer.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Texan Torture
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfer and an Ex-Military member take on the Texan countryside with armadillo, big horn sheep and wild boar. Their skills are tested as they battle starvation and a dangerous flood.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rain of Terror
programme.desc: A mother and an adventure addict enter the cloud forest of Ecuador and encounter unbearably wet conditions, lightning, cabin fever, trench foot and finger-slicing machetes during their 21-day challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A self-taught survivalist and an impulsive black belt take on the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. The environment features a variety of deadly predators, but when one of them fails to pull their weight, it becomes clear their worst enemy could be each other.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Boiling Point
programme.desc: The islanders are three weeks in to their challenge and struggling to survive. The group has gone seven days without a real meal, and tensions over money are high. Morag's frustration boils over, and Jack and Ben take on Marco in a race for cash.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Sunstroke of Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. Two survivalists Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian island for 21 days. The surfer girl and the former Marine clash when sunstroke and starvation threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Boiling Point
programme.desc: The islanders are three weeks in to their challenge and struggling to survive. The group has gone seven days without a real meal, and tensions over money are high. Morag's frustration boils over, and Jack and Ben take on Marco in a race for cash.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Surviving Starvation and Inner Struggles
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. Two survivalists Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian island for three weeks. The surfer girl and the former Marine clash when sunstroke and starvation threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: With just three days to preserve the legacy of a fourth generation Alaskan homesteading family, the Raneys must fix an earthquake-ravaged foundation and revive a dormant garden before hitting the lower 48 for another year of incredible rescues.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups' Adventures in Babysitting/ Pups Save the Fireworks

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Squirrels/ Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard. It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a Roo and the day.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups in a Jam/ Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Genie in a Bubble

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Ninja Season
